topics.summary: The DPK is advancing a 'fabricated prosecution' special counsel bill that would grant a president-appointed special prosecutor the authority to drop charges in cases allegedly stemming from prosecutorial misconduct, potentially nullifying up to eight criminal cases against President Lee Jae-myung. The bill triggered fierce opposition from the PPP and rare internal DPK dissent, prompting party leadership to delay the vote until after the June 3 local elections.

evidence_headlines.title: 이 대통령 재판 8개 모두 '무효화'되는 길 열리나···'조작기소 특검법안' 논란 확산
與 조작기소 특검법 수정론 확산…野 총공세 박차
안철수 "이재명 재판 없애려는 법"…공소취소 특검 정면 비판

topics.summary: With the June 3 nationwide local elections less than four weeks away, the DPK holds a commanding party approval lead (46% vs. PPP's 21%), threatening to extend its dominance from the national legislature to local governments. The PPP is battling internal contradictions between 'pro-Yoon' (친윤) candidates who may damage electoral prospects and reform-minded figures pushing for party renewal.

evidence_headlines.title: 6·3 지방선거, 녹록잖은 내란 잔불…자욱해지는 시야
[정치] 이 대통령 지지율 67%...민주 46%·국민의힘 18% [NBS]
'역대급의 대혼전' PK 지방선거 판세 분석

topics.summary: The Seoul High Court's dedicated insurrection bench began appeal proceedings in Yoon Seok-yeol's main insurrection-ringleader case in late April and is advancing toward a verdict expected around May 28, while a separate arrest-obstruction appeal already resulted in a seven-year sentence on April 29. The ongoing trials keep the December 2024 martial law crisis at the center of political discourse ahead of the local elections.

evidence_headlines.title: 윤석열 '체포방해' 오늘 항소심 선고… 비상계엄 관련 첫 2심 판단
尹 '내란 우두머리' 2심 시작…法 "전담재판부법 위헌제청, 빠른 시일 내 결정"
윤석열 내란 재판/전개 (선고기일 2026년 5월 28일)

topics.topic_en: Han Dong-hoon Independent Run and PPP Factional Split
topics.summary: Expelled ex-PPP leader Han Dong-hoon registered as an independent candidate in the Busan Buk-gap parliamentary by-election (June 3), running against the PPP's pro-Yoon nominee Park Min-sik and DPK's Ha Jeong-u in a tight three-way race. Han has branded the DPK's prosecution bill as equivalent to Yoon's martial law, while the PPP's internal rift between 'pro-Yoon' loyalists and reform-minded members remains a central narrative.

evidence_headlines.title: 공소취소 특검법에 汎野 각개전투…한동훈 "국회 들어가 이재명 탄핵"
'전 국민의힘 대표' vs '무소속'‥부산 북구갑 여론조사의 비밀은?
하정우·한동훈, 지역 원로 정치인 영입...달아오르는 부산 북갑

topics.summary: The DPK's push to hold a constitutional referendum concurrently with the June 3 local elections collapsed on May 8 after the PPP threatened a filibuster, prompting National Assembly Speaker Woo Won-sik to withdraw the bill from the agenda. The episode, despite polls showing 59% public support for constitutional reform, has shifted the debate to the second half of the 22nd National Assembly term.

evidence_headlines.title: 6·3 개헌 국민투표 결국 무산
혹시나 했는데 역시나…6·3 지방선거 동시 개헌 국민투표 무산 여파는?
제10차 개헌/제22대 국회 개헌안 — 국민의힘 보이콧으로 표결 무산

topics.summary: President Lee Jae-myung's approval rating held at 59.7% in the first week of May (Realmeter), a slight uptick but well below his 65.5% peak; DPK party support stands at 48.7% versus PPP's 30.9%. Sustained high approval gives the DPK political confidence ahead of local elections, but the prosecution bill controversy is flagged by analysts as a potential drag on moderate support.

evidence_headlines.title: 李대통령 지지율 59.7% '소폭 상승'…민주 48.7% vs 국힘 30.9%
이 대통령 지지율 65.5% 취임 후 최고‥민주당 50.5%·국힘 31.4%
[정치] 이 대통령 지지율 67%...민주 46%·국민의힘 18% [NBS]

topics.topic_en: Korea-US Defense Ministerial OPCON Transfer Talks
topics.summary: Defense Minister Ahn Gyu-baek flew to Washington for his first meeting with US Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth on May 11, with wartime operational control (OPCON) transfer and nuclear-powered submarine cooperation topping the agenda. The talks are being watched as a signal of how the Lee administration will manage alliance recalibration under the Trump administration.

evidence_headlines.title: 한미, 11일 국방장관회담…핵추진잠수함·전시작전권 전환 논의
안규백 취임 후 첫 방미…전작권 전환·핵잠 등 논의
안규백 국방장관, 10일 첫 방미 … 전작권·핵잠 놓고 한미 조율

topics.topic_en: Korea-US Trade Deal and Tariff Ratification Dispute
topics.summary: The Lee government's bilateral trade framework with the US — committing Korea to $350 billion in US strategic investment, 15% auto tariffs, and semiconductor carve-outs — has reignited a domestic dispute over whether the agreement requires formal National Assembly ratification. The PPP accuses the DPK-led government of bypassing constitutional procedure, branding the outcome a 'tariff disaster,' while the government defends it as a diplomatic success.

evidence_headlines.title: 한미, 관세협상 타결…자동차관세 15%·현금투자 연 200억 달러 상한
2025년 세계 무역 전쟁/대한민국 — 국민의힘 "관세 참사" 규정 공세
South Korea commits $350 billion to US strategic industries following Trump tariff pressure

method_notes: Captured via Anthropic API (Sonnet 4.6) with web_search for live Korean political coverage. Topic labels (topic_en) are stable handles for cross-snapshot rank comparison.
